positive: A vibrant, stylized symmetrical mandala pattern featuring stylized mystical fauna, such as celestial hummingbirds and bioluminescent moths, integrated with elegant abstract floral elements. The color palette should be jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) set against a creamy, aged parchment background. The design must have strong, clean silhouettes with high contrast, suitable for repeating textile prints. Detailed line art style with subtle watercolor washes, clean vector quality, perfect symmetry, centered composition, highly intricate, perfect for apparel graphics.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, text, logo, watermark, cropped, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grayscale, low detail, muddy colors, graffiti, messy, asymmetrical
